description: Add JSDoc documentation comments to all functions, classes, and exported declarations in the app/lib/ directory (database, logger, metrics, telemetry, repositories, generated models, utility modules)
steps: Add JSDoc to app/lib/database.ts - document the db export and connection setup
Add JSDoc to app/lib/date.ts - document all date utility functions
Add JSDoc to app/lib/db.ts - document the DB connection factory
Add JSDoc to app/lib/ensureMigrations.ts - document the migration helper
Add JSDoc to app/lib/logger.ts - document the Logger class and all its methods (getTraceContext, formatMessage, log, withSpan, debug, info, warn, error)
Add JSDoc to app/lib/metrics.ts - document all metric functions
Add JSDoc to app/lib/telemetry.ts - document telemetry setup
Add JSDoc to app/lib/types.ts - document all type/interface declarations if they contain functions
Add JSDoc to app/lib/repositories/BaseRepository.ts - document the abstract class and all methods (findById, findAll, count, exists)
Add JSDoc to app/lib/repositories/BrewRepository.ts - document the class and all methods
Add JSDoc to app/lib/generated-models/Beans.ts - document the model class and methods
Add JSDoc to app/lib/generated-models/BrewFeedback.ts - document the model class and methods
Add JSDoc to app/lib/generated-models/Brews.ts - document the model class and methods
Add JSDoc to app/lib/generated-models/BrewsJoined.ts - document the class and methods
Add JSDoc to app/lib/generated-models/Grinders.ts - document the model class and methods
Add JSDoc to app/lib/generated-models/Methods.ts - document the model class and methods
Add JSDoc to app/lib/generated-models/index.ts - document any exports
acceptance_criteria: Every exported function, class, and class method in app/lib/ has a JSDoc comment
JSDoc comments are meaningful and describe the purpose, parameters, and return values
pnpm type-check still passes after changes
